name: Action
description: Movies characterized by fast-paced sequences, physical conflicts, and intense scenes.

name: Adventure
description: Stories focused on journeys, exploration, and challenges in unfamiliar environments.

name: Comedy
description: Films designed to entertain and amuse through humor and light-hearted situations.

name: Drama
description: Narratives centered on emotional conflicts, character development, and human relationships.

name: Science Fiction
description: Explores speculative scientific concepts such as advanced technology, space travel, or time travel.

name: Fantasy
description: Films set in imaginary worlds featuring magical or supernatural elements.

name: Horror
description: Created to evoke fear, tension, or psychological unease in the audience.

name: Mystery
description: Stories revolving around solving crimes, puzzles, or unexplained events.

name: Romance
description: Films that explore romantic relationships and emotional connections.

name: Thriller
description: Intense and suspenseful narratives often featuring unexpected twists.

name: Animation
description: Movies produced using animation techniques, both traditional and digital.

name: Documentary
description: Films based on real events intended to inform, educate, or portray reality.
